mapper.sql: rdp_apply_collect_info.id id, rdp_apply_collect_info.gmt_create gmt_create, rdp_apply_collect_info.gmt_modified gmt_modified, rdp_apply_collect_info.report_time report_time, rdp_apply_collect_info.apply_id apply_id, rdp_apply_collect_info.job_id job_id, rdp_apply_collect_info.task_id task_id, rdp_apply_collect_info.link_type link_type, rdp_apply_collect_info.src_ds_type src_ds_type, rdp_apply_collect_info.dst_ds_type dst_ds_type, rdp_apply_collect_info.collect_name collect_name, rdp_apply_collect_info.collect_value collect_value
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rdp_apply_collect_info WHERE apply_id = #{applyId} AND collect_name = #{collectName}
